reason: handlers/ vs triggers/ vs services/ vs tools/ split; webhook handler + new onIssueWritten trigger placement; githubClient is the only place for GitHub API calls.
Webhook verify-first then 401/400/200-dup/200; HttpsError unused here (HTTP codes); Rule D (slow OpenAI/GitHub calls outside idempotency txn); best-effort pattern for issue mirroring.
Firestore paths (commits/pullRequests/issues subcollections), FieldValue.increment for counters, runTransaction with in-txn idempotent read for onPRMerged, FieldValue.vector for embeddings.
v2-only, region, OpenAI structured/embedding via config MODELS, .beta.parse path, no inline secrets/model names, idempotency on every trigger.
Structured logger for webhook dispatch + each trigger step.
jest + ts-jest boundary mocking for onRequest webhook (mock crypto verify, Firestore) and triggers (mock OpenAI, Octokit, Firestore).
